name: Depth Displacement + Post
description: Offline-validated chain combining a synthetic depth map (noise), a Displace TOP relief warp over a ramp source, and a finishing post stack (blur + level grade). Builds and previews with zero hardware. UNVERIFIED pending live cook-check in TouchDesigner.

nodes.name: displace1
nodes.comment: Warps src1 by depth1 (input 0 = source, input 1 = displacement map)

parameters.name: displace_amount
parameters.label: Displace Amount
parameters.description: How hard the depth map pushes the source pixels.

parameters.name: depth_period
parameters.label: Depth Period
parameters.description: Spatial scale of the synthetic depth noise (larger = bigger features).

preview_description: A radial ramp warped by animated noise relief, softened by a post blur and lifted in contrast — a quick depth-displacement + finishing-grade demo that runs with zero hardware.
